what_it_does: An empty zero-byte placeholder file whose only function is to make git track the otherwise-empty 'atomicity/' directory.
observations: Located in a directory named 'atomicity' that contains no other files
conventions: Follows the standard git .gitkeep idiom for committing empty directories
notes: Empty placeholder — only signal is that someone reserved an 'atomicity/' directory but has not yet populated it.
questions: What is the 'atomicity/' directory intended to hold?
purpose_vs_actual: n/a — placeholder file with no stated purpose beyond directory retention
apparent_themes: intent staked out before content exists
intention_signals: Reserves a named slot ('atomicity') in the design-system tree, signalling a planned but not-yet-built area.
contribution: Marks the existence of a reserved 'atomicity' concept-slot in the directory structure.
summary_for_embedding: Empty .gitkeep placeholder file retaining an empty 'atomicity' directory in the claude-ds design system.
intention_for_embedding: To reserve and commit an empty 'atomicity' directory for future content.
